method: exact dot-product over committed doc embeddings (data/embeddings/doc_embeddings.npy)
note: Naive all-query recall is low ONLY because the demo index holds a 500K-passage subset of MS MARCO's ~8.8M; 149/7433 (2.0%) of dev gold passages are in it, so ~98% of dev queries are unanswerable. Answerable-only recall (gold passage present in the index) is the model's real retrieval quality. A direct probe confirms the model works: a query scores 0.67 against its relevant passage vs 0.01 against an irrelevant one. Reproduce with: python scripts/eval_recall.py
